calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-07-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Jun-03-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for a specially set Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Paul Ryan Associates, a California corporation, a/k/a Ryan Associates.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Linda Forster, CSR #13286. Email: lforster@ssftc.org.

Russel Bolin, Esq. and Patrick Thesing, Esq. specially appeared for plaintiff Distinct Engineering Solution, Inc.
Ram Tirumala, President of Distinct Engineering Solution, Inc., was placed under oath and testified.
Messrs. Bolin, Thesing and Tirumala appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Paul Ryan Associates, a California corporation, a/k/a Ryan Associates.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Open Book Account, Reasonable Value of Services Received, Account Stated and Unjust Enrichment was filed on February 6, 2019, and personally served on defendant Paul Ryan Associates' Registered Agent of Process on March 8, 2019.
Default as to defendant Paul Ryan Associates, a California corporation, a/k/a Ryan Associates, was entered on May 3, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on May 3, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Distinct Engineering Solution, Inc., and against the defaulted defendant Paul Ryan Associates, a California corporation, a/k/a Ryan Associates, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $25,092.50.
Prejudgment Interest - $11,212.57.
Attorney Fees - $1,200.00.
Costs - $614.85.

Total - $38,119.92.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
